title: elaphoglossum luteum
intro: Elaphoglossum luteum, also known as the yellow elaphoglossum, is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum luteum include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Elaphoglossum luteum are often used in teas, infusions, and poultices, and can be dried or made into capsules for further use.
